                                      error_msgs):

                """Overwrite the method to support partial loading."""

                local_name_params = itertools.chain(self.named_parameters(),

                                                    self.named_buffers())

                local_state = {k: v for k, v in local_name_params

                               if v is not None}

    block: Type[Union[BasicBlock, Bottleneck]],
    layers: List[int],
    pretrained: bool,
    progress: bool,
    **kwargs: Any,
) -> ResNet:
    model = ResNet(block, layers, **kwargs)
    if pretrained:
        state_dict = load_state_dict_from_url(_MODEL_URLS["resnet50"], progress=progress)
        model.load_state_dict(state_dict)
    return model
